table-user-id.name: Table User
table-user-id.hint: The user account that drives the shared TV. Must be Player role. Enter either the user's name (e.g. 'Table') OR the user ID.

fit-mode.name: Default Scene Fit Mode
fit-mode.hint: How scenes should fit the Table screen by default. Per-scene override available in Scene Config.

custom-scale.name: Physical grid-square size
custom-scale.hint: For the 'Physical mini' fit mode: the real-world size one grid square should render at on the Table display, in the unit chosen below. E.g. 1 inch for standard 25mm minis. Requires the display diagonal set too.

physical-target-unit.name: Physical size unit
physical-target-unit.hint: Unit for the physical grid-square size above.

display-diagonal-in.name: Table display diagonal (inches)
display-diagonal-in.hint: The physical diagonal of the Table TV in inches (e.g. 55 for a 55" TV). Used with the native resolution to compute pixels-per-inch for the 'Physical mini' fit mode.

display-res-width.name: Table display width (pixels)
display-res-width.hint: The Table display's native horizontal resolution in pixels. Leave 0 to auto-detect on the Table client itself (recommended — a value entered on the GM laptop would describe the wrong screen).

display-res-height.name: Table display height (pixels)
display-res-height.hint: The Table display's native vertical resolution in pixels. Leave 0 to auto-detect on the Table client itself (recommended — a value entered on the GM laptop would describe the wrong screen).

highlight-enabled.name: Show Active-Turn Highlight
highlight-enabled.hint: Draw a glowing ring under the active combatant on this client.

highlight-style.name: Active-Turn Highlight Style
highlight-style.hint: Visual style for the active-turn highlight. All styles are rendered natively — no external modules required.

highlight-use-disposition.name: Color Highlight by Disposition
highlight-use-disposition.hint: Friendly/neutral/hostile use different ring colors. Disable for a single neutral color.

combat-hud-enabled.name: Show Combat HUD
combat-hud-enabled.hint: Show a text-only overlay on this client with the current and next combatant and the round number during combat. Hidden combatants are shown as '?' — to keep an NPC off the display, mark the combatant or its token hidden.

table-mode.name: Table Mode
table-mode.hint: play = UI hidden + canvas locked. setup = UI visible + canvas pannable.

suppress-table-chat.name: Suppress Chat Input on Table
suppress-table-chat.hint: Hide the chat input on the Table client so spectators can't type.

auto-grant-ownership.name: Auto-grant OWNER on PCs
auto-grant-ownership.hint: Automatically grant the Table user OWNER on every player-owned actor. Required for the Table to drag tokens.

popup-backdrop.name: Dim Canvas Behind Pop-ups
popup-backdrop.hint: Darken the rest of the canvas when a journal/item/portrait pop-up is open on the Table.

spotlight-enabled.name: Enable Spotlight Token Control
spotlight-enabled.hint: Show a GM-only 'Spotlight token' control in the Community Screen palette to force the Table onto a chosen token's vision until cleared. Auto-clears when combat starts or ends.

toggle-table-mode.name: Toggle Table Mode
toggle-table-mode.hint: Flip the Table client between play (UI hidden, canvas locked) and setup (UI visible, canvas unlocked).

close-all-popups.name: Close All Table Pop-ups
close-all-popups.hint: Close every pop-up open on the Table client.

spotlight.dialog-title: Spotlight a token on the Table

notifications.physical-fit-failed: Physical fit failed — check the display diagonal, resolution, and grid-square size settings.
notifications.physical-fit-clamped: Physical fit scale is below Foundry's minimum zoom and may be clamped; minis could render slightly large.

errors.unknown-table-user: Table user '{value}' was not found. Check the Table User setting — accepts a user name or id.
errors.no-observer-actors: The configured Table user has no actors with OBSERVER or OWNER permission. Vision will not work until permissions are granted.
errors.spotlight-failed: Could not spotlight the token on the Table.
errors.no-tokens: No tokens on the current scene to spotlight.

warnings.no-table-user-online: Configured Table user is not currently logged in.
